records.title: Command Registration Completeness
records.description: Activation must register all contributed commands.

records.title: Global Handler Idempotency
records.description: Global process handlers must not duplicate across lifecycle transitions.

records.title: Startup Verification Non-Intrusiveness
records.description: Startup verification should avoid interactive auth prompts unless user-triggered.

records.title: Byte-Preserving Change Rollback
records.description: Managed file rollback must preserve byte-exact content.

records.title: Watcher Startup Idempotency
records.description: Watcher startup must avoid duplicate listener allocation.

records.title: Parse Failure Preservation
records.description: MCP parse errors must not destructively overwrite existing config.

records.title: Cross-Surface Merge Consistency
records.description: User and workspace MCP merge paths must provide equivalent non-destructive guarantees.

records.title: Shell-Safe Parameter Encoding
records.description: Workflow event/job values must preserve shell-safe argument boundaries.

records.title: Conversion Path Responsiveness
records.description: Conversion flow should avoid extension-host blocking patterns.

records.title: Activation Contract Tests Must Execute
records.description: Activation command contract tests must run and track current command IDs.

records.title: Least-Privilege Auth Scope
records.description: Auth scope requests should follow least privilege by operation.

records.title: Deterministic Startup Writes
records.description: Startup verification writes should be deterministic and minimized.
